title: Assistant Store Manager - Max Fashion - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Max Fashion - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Max Fashion! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Rajkot team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Max Fashion:
Max Fashion is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Fashion!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
